_comment: Add the 'context-portfolio' block into the mcpServers section of your existing claude_desktop_config.json. Replace YOUR_VPS_IP with your Hetzner VPS IP address.

_notes: This uses SSH stdio proxying — no open port required on the VPS.
Your local SSH key must be in ~/.ssh/authorized_keys on the VPS.
BatchMode=yes prevents SSH from hanging waiting for a password prompt.
Replace root@YOUR_VPS_IP with your actual user and IP.
If your SSH key is not the default (~/.ssh/id_rsa), add: '-i', '/path/to/your/key'
